description: §19.4.3 `!{}` handler SUCCESS passthrough: loadItem('ok') returns the id (no fail), no arm fires, the success value flows to `result`, and the handler lifts it to Phase.Loaded(result). Proves `!{}` catches ONLY error variants; the success value passes through unwrapped.
rationale: Success passthrough: loadItem('ok') returns the id (no fail), so no `!{}` arm fires and the success value flows to `result`; the handler then lifts it to Phase.Loaded(result). Proves the `!{}` handler catches ONLY error variants and passes the success value through.
